entries.title: 海边少女 — 日常向
entries.prompt: artist:artistA0.5, artist:artistB0.3, {{{masterpiece}}}, best quality, 1girl, solo, looking at viewer, smile, casual clothes, outdoor, beach, ocean, soft lighting, depth of field, summer vibes
entries.comment:
这个串出图质量很稳定，适合日常阳光风格。
建议配合 lighting 类 tag 一起使用，海边场景需要注意水面反射光线可能导致过曝。

entries.title: 午后时光
entries.prompt: artist:artistC0.6, {{{loli}}}, cute, small breasts, ribbon, frilled dress, indoors, window light, soft focus, afternoon, warm colors
entries.comment:
萝莉向专用串，出图偏软萌风格。室内窗边光线出图非常有氛围感。
注意体重词的配比可能需要根据模型微调。

entries.title: 夜宴
entries.prompt: artist:artistD0.4, {{{milf}}}, mature female, large breasts, elegant, evening dress, chandelier, dim lighting, wine glass, luxurious, seductive smile
entries.comment:
成熟女性风格串，适合华丽昏暗场景。
丰满体型出图效果很好，适合昏暗灯光氛围。

entries.title: 静谧庭院
entries.prompt: artist:artistE0.5, {{{masterpiece}}}, best quality, 1girl, solo, sitting, garden, flowers, sunlight filtering through leaves, peaceful expression, white dress, butterflies
entries.comment:
花园庭院风格，适合安静唯美氛围。画面偏明亮日系风格。
建议在上午时段出图，光影层次更丰富。
